description: calm soul who loves the ocean, slow to anger, drifts through life peacefully
quiet bookworm who loves rainy days, tea, and long naps
energetic kid who never sits still, always running and bouncing off the walls
huge appetite, loves food more than anything, will eat anything in sight
shy and gentle, hides from strangers, just wants to be left alone with one close friend
fascinated by the night sky, stars, and the moon
tough fighter who never backs down, pushes through pain, all about discipline
elegant and graceful, loves dance and beauty, refined taste
mysterious loner who prefers shadows and solitude, a bit dangerous
warm and friendly, loves making new friends, always cheerful
loves the cold, snow, and frozen mountains, peaceful and serene
fiery temper, easily angered, explosive emotions
loves bugs, creepy crawlies, anything with lots of legs
extremely lazy, would nap all day if allowed, low energy
obsessed with machines, electronics, and gadgets
endlessly curious, always exploring, has to investigate everything
powerful and intimidating, commands respect just by showing up
deeply connected to the forest, plants, and nature
playful trickster who loves pranks and mischief
loyal protector, fiercely defends close friends and family
ancient and wise, holds great knowledge and secrets
extremely fast and competitive, lives for the thrill of racing
soft, fluffy, adorable, makes everyone smile
loves singing, music, and performing for an audience
small and underestimated but determined to prove themselves
